title: crotalaria cylindrica
intro: Crotalaria cylindrica, also known as the 'Bush Stick' or 'Njano' plant, is a tropical shrub native to Africa and Asia, belonging to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria cylindrica include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, or as a powder to be taken orally or applied topically to the affected area.
